objects.name: app_meta
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE app_meta (
          key        TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          value      TEXT,
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: asset_bookings
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE asset_bookings (
          id                    TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id               TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          contact_id            TEXT    REFERENCES contacts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
          start_date            INTEGER NOT NULL,            -- day-start UNIX-ms (inclusive)
          end_date              INTEGER NOT NULL,            -- day-start UNIX-ms (inclusive)
          note                  TEXT,
          cancelled_at          INTEGER,                     -- set ⇒ derived 'cancelled'
          converted_checkout_id TEXT,                        -- set ⇒ derived 'converted' (soft pointer, not FK)
          created_at            INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at            INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (end_date >= start_date)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: capabilities
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE capabilities (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id    TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          key        TEXT    NOT NULL,           -- e.g. 'voltage', 'package'
          value_num  REAL,                       -- numeric magnitude (>/< comparisons)
          value_text TEXT,                        -- text/categorical value (EQUALS/HAS)
          weight     REAL    NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0, -- relevance/salience (§4 weighted)
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (weight >= 0)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: categories
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE categories (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          name       TEXT    NOT NULL,
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: category_fields
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE category_fields (
          id            TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          category_id   TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          name          TEXT    NOT NULL,
          field_type    TEXT    NOT NULL,
          options       TEXT,                          -- JSON array for SELECT fields
          is_required   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          default_value TEXT,                          -- lenient-defaulting value (§4)
          position      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          updated_at    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (field_type IN ('TEXT', 'NUMBER', 'BOOLEAN', 'DATE', 'SELECT')),
          CHECK (is_required IN (0, 1))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: checkouts
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE checkouts (
          id             TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id        TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          contact_id     TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          quantity       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
          due_date       INTEGER,
          checked_out_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          returned_at    INTEGER,
          note           TEXT,
          updated_at     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)), source_location_id TEXT REFERENCES locations(id), source_batch_key TEXT,
          CHECK (quantity > 0),
          CHECK (returned_at IS NULL OR returned_at >= checked_out_at)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: contacts
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE contacts (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          name       TEXT    NOT NULL,
          note       TEXT,
          created_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: item_aliases
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE item_aliases (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id    TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          alias      TEXT    NOT NULL,
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: item_attachments
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE item_attachments (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id    TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          kind       TEXT    NOT NULL,
          value      TEXT    NOT NULL,
          label      TEXT,
          position   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          created_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)), origin_device_id TEXT,
          CHECK (kind IN ('URL', 'LOCAL_POINTER'))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: item_field_values
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE item_field_values (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id    TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          field_id   TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES category_fields(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          value      TEXT,
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          UNIQUE (item_id, field_id)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: item_history
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE item_history (
          id              TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id         TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          action          TEXT    NOT NULL,
          quantity_delta  INTEGER,
          net_value_delta REAL,
          note            TEXT,
          metadata        TEXT,
          created_at      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: item_images
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE item_images (
          id                 TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id            TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          thumbnail_blob     BLOB,
          full_res_opfs_path TEXT    NOT NULL,
          position           INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          created_at         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        , full_res_downgraded_at INTEGER) STRICT

objects.name: item_stock
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE item_stock (
          id          TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id     TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          location_id TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES locations(id),
          quantity    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          created_at  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (quantity >= 0),
          UNIQUE (item_id, location_id)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: item_tags
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE item_tags (
          item_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          tag_id  TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          PRIMARY KEY (item_id, tag_id)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: items
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE items (
          id                   TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          name                 TEXT    NOT NULL,
          description          TEXT,
          location_id          TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES locations(id),
          category_id          TEXT    REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
          tracking_mode        TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DISCRETE',
          quantity             INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          unit_of_measure      TEXT,
          gross_capacity       REAL,
          tare_weight          REAL,
          current_net_value    REAL,
          operational_metadata TEXT,
          is_active            INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
          created_at           INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at           INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)), serial_no INTEGER, mpn TEXT, manufacturer TEXT, unit_cost REAL, expiry_date INTEGER, batch_number TEXT, lot_number TEXT, condition TEXT CHECK (condition IS NULL OR condition IN ('MINT', 'GOOD', 'NEEDS_REPAIR', 'OUT_FOR_CALIBRATION')), parent_id TEXT REFERENCES items(id), reorder_point INTEGER, reorder_gauge_percent REAL, reorder_qty INTEGER, acquired_at TEXT, warranty_expires_at TEXT, purchase_price REAL CHECK (purchase_price IS NULL OR purchase_price >= 0), depreciation_months INTEGER CHECK (depreciation_months IS NULL OR depreciation_months > 0),
          CHECK (tracking_mode IN ('DISCRETE', 'SERIALISED', 'CONSUMABLE_GAUGE')),
          CHECK (is_active IN (0, 1)),
          CHECK (quantity >= 0),
          CHECK (tracking_mode <> 'SERIALISED' OR quantity = 1),
          -- Gauge fields are mandatory and sane only for CONSUMABLE_GAUGE items.
          CHECK (
            tracking_mode <> 'CONSUMABLE_GAUGE' OR (
              unit_of_measure   IS NOT NULL AND
              gross_capacity    IS NOT NULL AND gross_capacity > 0 AND
              tare_weight       IS NOT NULL AND tare_weight >= 0 AND
              current_net_value IS NOT NULL AND current_net_value >= 0
            )
          )
        ) STRICT

objects.name: items_fts
objects.sql:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE items_fts USING fts5(
          name, description, mpn, manufacturer,
          content='items',
          content_rowid='rowid'
        )

objects.name: items_fts_config
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'items_fts_config'(k PRIMARY KEY, v) WITHOUT ROWID

objects.name: items_fts_data
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'items_fts_data'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, block BLOB)

objects.name: items_fts_docsize
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'items_fts_docsize'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sz BLOB)

objects.name: items_fts_idx
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'items_fts_idx'(segid, term, pgno, PRIMARY KEY(segid, term)) WITHOUT ROWID

objects.name: locations
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE locations (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          name       TEXT    NOT NULL,
          parent_id  TEXT    REFERENCES locations(id),
          is_system  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)), description TEXT, color TEXT,
          CHECK (parent_id IS NULL OR parent_id <> id),
          CHECK (is_system IN (0, 1))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: maintenance_schedules
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE maintenance_schedules (
          id                  TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id             TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          name                TEXT    NOT NULL,
          basis               TEXT    NOT NULL,
          interval_days       INTEGER,
          interval_usage      REAL,
          usage_unit          TEXT,
          usage_since_service REAL    NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          last_performed_at   INTEGER,
          note                TEXT,
          created_at          INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at          INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)), accrue_checkout_hours INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, location_id TEXT REFERENCES locations(id),
          CHECK (basis IN ('TIME', 'USAGE')),
          CHECK (usage_since_service >= 0),
          -- A TIME schedule needs a positive day interval; a USAGE schedule a
          -- positive usage interval. (DOM-drift-style: never a silent NULL.)
          CHECK (basis <> 'TIME'  OR (interval_days  IS NOT NULL AND interval_days  > 0)),
          CHECK (basis <> 'USAGE' OR (interval_usage IS NOT NULL AND interval_usage > 0))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: project_bom_lines
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE project_bom_lines (
          id                 TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          project_id         TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          item_id            TEXT    REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
          designator         TEXT,
          mpn                TEXT,
          manufacturer       TEXT,
          description        TEXT,
          required_qty       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
          reserved_qty       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          reservation_status TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NONE',
          procurement_status TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NONE',
          unit_cost_snapshot REAL,
          position           INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          created_at         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)), received_qty INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          CHECK (required_qty >= 0),
          CHECK (reserved_qty >= 0),
          CHECK (reservation_status IN ('NONE', 'TENTATIVE', 'ACTUAL')),
          CHECK (procurement_status IN ('NONE', 'ORDERED', 'IN_TRANSIT', 'RECEIVED'))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: project_budget_categories
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE project_budget_categories (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          project_id TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          name       TEXT    NOT NULL,
          amount     REAL    NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          position   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          created_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (amount >= 0)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: project_expenses
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE project_expenses (
          id          TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          project_id  TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          category_id TEXT    REFERENCES project_budget_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
          description TEXT,
          amount      REAL    NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          incurred_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          created_at  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (amount >= 0)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: projects
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE projects (
          id           TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          name         TEXT    NOT NULL,
          description  TEXT,
          status       TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PLANNING',
          costing_mode TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CURRENT_REPLACEMENT',
          created_at   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)), budget REAL,
          CHECK (status IN ('PLANNING', 'ACTIVE', 'COMPLETED', 'ARCHIVED')),
          CHECK (costing_mode IN ('CURRENT_REPLACEMENT', 'POINT_IN_TIME'))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: purchase_order_lines
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE purchase_order_lines (
          id               TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          po_id            TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES purchase_orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          item_id          TEXT    REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
          supplier_part_id TEXT    REFERENCES supplier_parts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
          description      TEXT,
          ordered_qty      INTEGER NOT NULL,
          received_qty     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          unit_cost        REAL,
          created_at       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (ordered_qty > 0),
          CHECK (received_qty >= 0),
          CHECK (unit_cost IS NULL OR unit_cost >= 0)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: purchase_orders
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE purchase_orders (
          id            TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          supplier_name TEXT    NOT NULL,
          reference     TEXT,
          status        TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
          currency      TEXT,
          created_at    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          ordered_at    INTEGER,
          updated_at    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (status IN ('DRAFT', 'ORDERED', 'PARTIAL', 'RECEIVED', 'CANCELLED'))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: stock_batches
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE stock_batches (
          id           TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id      TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          location_id  TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES locations(id),
          batch_key    TEXT    NOT NULL,
          batch_number TEXT,
          lot_number   TEXT,
          expiry_date  INTEGER,
          quantity     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          created_at   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (quantity >= 0),
          UNIQUE (item_id, location_id, batch_key)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: supplier_parts
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE supplier_parts (
          id            TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          item_id       TEXT    NOT NULL REFERENCES items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          supplier_name TEXT    NOT NULL,
          order_code    TEXT,
          unit_cost     REAL,
          currency      TEXT,
          pack_qty      INTEGER,
          min_order_qty INTEGER,
          price_breaks  TEXT,
          url           TEXT,
          is_preferred  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          created_at    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          updated_at    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          CHECK (is_preferred IN (0, 1)),
          CHECK (unit_cost IS NULL OR unit_cost >= 0),
          CHECK (pack_qty IS NULL OR pack_qty > 0),
          CHECK (min_order_qty IS NULL OR min_order_qty > 0)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: sync_meta
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE sync_meta (
          id                  INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (id = 1),
          last_sync_timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          clock_offset        INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          updated_at          INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        , history_pruned_before INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0) STRICT

objects.name: tags
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE tags (
          id         TEXT    PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
          name       TEXT    NOT NULL,
          updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER))
        ) STRICT

objects.name: tombstones
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE tombstones (
          table_name TEXT    NOT NULL,
          id         TEXT    NOT NULL,
          deleted_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)),
          PRIMARY KEY (table_name, id)
        ) STRICT

objects.name: items_fts_ad
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER items_fts_ad AFTER DELETE ON items BEGIN
          INSERT INTO items_fts(items_fts, rowid, name, description, mpn, manufacturer)
          VALUES ('delete', old.rowid, old.name, old.description, old.mpn, old.manufacturer);
        END

objects.name: items_fts_ai
items_fts_au
trg_app_meta_updated_at
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_app_meta_updated_at
        AFTER UPDATE ON app_meta
        FOR EACH ROW
        WHEN NEW.updated_at = OLD.updated_at
        BEGIN
          UPDATE app_meta SET updated_at = (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)) WHERE key = NEW.key;
        END

objects.name: trg_asset_bookings_updated_at
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_asset_bookings_updated_at
        AFTER UPDATE ON asset_bookings
        FOR EACH ROW
        WHEN NEW.updated_at = OLD.updated_at
        BEGIN
          UPDATE asset_bookings SET updated_at = (CAST(ROUND(unixepoch('now', 'subsec') * 1000) AS INTEGER)) WHERE id = NEW.id;
        END

objects.name: trg_item_stock_recompute_del
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_item_stock_recompute_del
        AFTER DELETE ON item_stock
        FOR EACH ROW
        BEGIN
          UPDATE items
          SET quantity = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM item_stock WHERE item_id = OLD.item_id)
          WHERE id = OLD.item_id
            AND quantity <> (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM item_stock WHERE item_id = OLD.item_id);
        END

objects.name: trg_stock_batches_recompute_del
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_stock_batches_recompute_del
        AFTER DELETE ON stock_batches
        FOR EACH ROW
        BEGIN
          UPDATE item_stock
          SET quantity = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM stock_batches
                           WHERE item_id = OLD.item_id AND location_id = OLD.location_id)
          WHERE id = OLD.item_id || '|' || OLD.location_id
            AND quantity <> (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM stock_batches
                              WHERE item_id = OLD.item_id AND location_id = OLD.location_id);
        END

objects.name: trg_stock_batches_recompute_ins
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_stock_batches_recompute_ins
        AFTER INSERT ON stock_batches
        FOR EACH ROW
        BEGIN
          INSERT INTO item_stock (id, item_id, location_id, quantity)
          VALUES (
            NEW.item_id || '|' || NEW.location_id, NEW.item_id, NEW.location_id,
            (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM stock_batches
              WHERE item_id = NEW.item_id AND location_id = NEW.location_id)
          )
          ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET quantity = excluded.quantity
          WHERE item_stock.quantity <> excluded.quantity;
        END

objects.name: trg_stock_batches_recompute_upd
objects.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_stock_batches_recompute_upd
        AFTER UPDATE ON stock_batches
        FOR EACH ROW
        BEGIN
          UPDATE item_stock
          SET quantity = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM stock_batches
                           WHERE item_id = NEW.item_id AND location_id = NEW.location_id)
          WHERE id = NEW.item_id || '|' || NEW.location_id
            AND quantity <> (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM stock_batches
                              WHERE item_id = NEW.item_id AND location_id = NEW.location_id);
        END
